div1.entryFree: Delighted, adj. (derived from the subst.) endowed with delight, delightful: and the d. spirit to bathe in fiery floods, Meas. III, 1, 121 (i. e. the spirit having the power of giving delight, rich in delight). if virtue no d. beauty lack, Oth. I, 3, 290. to make my gift, the more delayed, d. Cymb. V, 4, 102.
